videoSnippet.title: Pure Chess Pleasure || Magnus vs Vincent || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Keymer, Vincent (2759)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.05.26
A21 English, Kramnik-Shirov counterattack

1.c4 e5 2.Nc3 Bb4 3.Nf3 Bxc3 4.dxc3 d6 5.e4 Nd7 6.Bd3 Nc5 7.Bc2 Nf6 8.Qe2 a5 9.Nd2 a4 10.Nb1 O-O 11.Na3 b6 12.Bd2 Qe8 13.Bg5 Qe6 14.f3 Ba6 15.Be3 Nfd7 16.O-O Rfc8 17.b4 axb3 18.axb3 Qe7 19.Qd2 Ne6 20.Nb5 Bb7 21.b4 h5 22.Bb3 Ndf8 23.Na7 Rd8 24.Ra2 h4 25.Rfa1 Qf6 26.h3 Ng6 27.Nb5 Rxa2 28.Rxa2 Rd7 29.Ra7 Bc6 30.Nxc7 Nxc7 31.b5 Ne8 32.Ra2 Bxe4 33.fxe4 Qd8 34.Qf2 Rb7 35.Ra6 Nf4 36.Bxb6 Nc7 37.Ra2 Qg5 38.Kh1 Nce6 39.Be3 Qe7 40.Kh2 Nc5 41.Bc2 g5 42.Qf3 Qe6 43.Qg4 Qxg4 44.hxg4 Kf8 45.Ra8+ Ke7 46.g3 hxg3+ 47.Kxg3 Nfe6 48.Kf3 Kd7 49.Ke2 Kc7 50.Kd2 Rb8 51.Ra7+ Rb7 52.Ra1 Kd7 53.Kc1 Kc7 54.Kb2 Rb8 55.Rh1 Kb6 56.Rh6 Ra8 57.Rf6 Ra7 58.Rf5 Rc7 59.Rf1 Ra7 60.Rd1 Rd7 61.Ka3 Rd8 62.Kb4 Kc7 63.Rf1 Rf8 64.Ra1 Kb7 65.Rf1 Kc7 66.Rf6 Nd7 67.Rf5 f6 68.Rf1 Nec5 69.Ra1 Kb7 70.Rh1 Ra8 71.Rh7 Kc7 72.Bxc5 dxc5+ 73.Kb3 Rb8 74.Kb2 Rb6 75.Ka3 Rd6 76.Rh2 Nb6 77.Kb3 Nd7 78.Rh3 Nb6 79.Bd3 Rd8 80.Kc2 Rd7 81.Rh6 Rd6 82.Be2 Nd7 83.Rh7 Kc8 84.Rf7 Nb6 85.Kb3 Kb8
